friendly_name: CLI Session Survival and Daemon Singleton
purpose_context: Spec Kitty users routinely clone the CLI into temp directories and run several sync daemons against one shared auth store. A real incident showed an orphan daemon's stale invalid_grant response deleting a still-valid local session. Tranche 1 makes refresh a machine-wide transaction, lets temp checkouts converge on one user-level daemon, sweeps orphans, and adds an auth doctor diagnostic so users only lose CLI auth for legitimate reasons.
purpose_tldr: Stop multi-process refresh races and orphan sync daemons from silently logging the CLI user out.
